span_mappings.nl_span: F^k ≠ 1 in the unit group for all 1 ≤ k < 24

formal_statement:
theorem fib_mat_unit_order_exact :
    ∀ k : Fin 24, k.val ≠ 0 → fib_mat_unit ^ k.val ≠ 1
natural_language_claim: For every k ∈ {1,...,23}, the Fibonacci matrix unit F satisfies F^k ≠ 1 in (M₂(ZMod 9))ˣ — the unit-group lift of the exact order statement.
